name: [GRV-API] Django Middleware Performance Monitor
message:
Django middleware performance degradation detected.

Middleware: {{django.middleware}}
P95 Duration: {{trace.django.middleware.duration.p95}}ms
Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}

Middleware Performance Impact:
- High middleware processing times affecting all requests
- May indicate inefficient authentication/authorization logic
- Potential bottlenecks in request preprocessing

Investigation Steps:
1. Check middleware performance: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api/resources?env=prod&resource=middleware
2. Review middleware code for optimization opportunities
3. Check external service calls in middleware
4. Analyze authentication/authorization efficiency
5. Consider middleware optimization or reordering

Middleware Dashboard: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api/resources?env=prod&resource=middleware

options.escalation_message: Django middleware performance continues to degrade. All requests may be impacted.
